name: Barbells
description: A long steel bar (typically 20kg/45lbs) loaded with weight plates on each end. Essential for compound lifts like squats deadlifts and bench press.

name: Squat Rack
description: An adjustable rack with safety catches for performing barbell squats overhead presses and other standing barbell movements safely.

name: Flat Bench Press
description: A flat bench with an integrated barbell rack designed specifically for the flat barbell bench press.

name: Incline Bench Press
description: An angled bench with barbell rack set at 30-45 degrees targeting the upper chest and front deltoids.

name: Decline Bench Press
description: A bench angled downward with barbell rack emphasizing the lower portion of the chest muscles.

name: Landmine Attachment
description: A pivot attachment that secures one end of a barbell to the floor enabling arcing pressing and rowing movements.

name: Hip Thrust Bench
description: A sturdy padded bench at the ideal height for barbell hip thrusts targeting the glutes and hamstrings.

name: Preacher Bench
description: An angled pad that supports the upper arms during bicep curls isolating the biceps and reducing momentum.

name: Smith Machine
description: A barbell fixed within steel rails allowing vertical movement only. Provides stability for squats presses and rows.

name: Dumbbells
description: Individual hand-held weights available in fixed or adjustable varieties. Versatile for unilateral and bilateral exercises.

name: Adjustable Bench
description: A bench with an adjustable backrest angle from flat to upright used with dumbbells for presses flyes and rows.

name: Kettlebells
description: Cast iron weights with a top handle ideal for swings cleans snatches and dynamic functional movements.

name: Single Adjustable Cable Machine
description: A single cable pulley that adjusts vertically providing constant tension for isolation and functional exercises.

name: Dual Cable Machine
description: A machine with two independent adjustable cable pulleys enabling crossovers flyes and bilateral cable work.

name: Lat Pull Down Machine
description: A cable machine with a high pulley and thigh pad designed for lat pulldowns targeting the back muscles.

name: Cable Row Machine
description: A seated cable station with a low pulley and foot platform for seated rows targeting the mid-back.

name: Leg Press Machine
description: A seated machine where you push a platform away using your legs. Targets quads glutes and hamstrings safely.

name: Leg Extension Machine
description: A seated machine that isolates the quadriceps by extending the legs against a padded roller.

name: Lying Leg Curl Machine
description: A prone machine that isolates the hamstrings by curling the legs toward the glutes against resistance.

name: Seated Leg Curl Machine
description: A seated machine that targets the hamstrings by curling the legs downward against a padded lever.

name: Standing Calf Raise Machine
description: A machine with shoulder pads for standing calf raises targeting the gastrocnemius muscle.

name: Seated Calf Raise Machine
description: A seated machine with a knee pad for calf raises emphasizing the soleus muscle of the calves.

name: Hip Abduction Machine
description: A seated machine where you push your legs outward against padded levers targeting the outer hip and glute muscles.

name: Hip Adduction Machine
description: A seated machine where you squeeze your legs inward against padded levers targeting the inner thigh muscles.

name: Assisted Pull-Up/Dip Machine
description: A counterbalanced machine that provides assistance for pull-ups and dips making them accessible at any strength level.

name: Machine Chest Press
description: A seated pressing machine that targets the chest shoulders and triceps with a guided pressing motion.

name: Pec Deck
description: A seated machine with padded arms for chest flyes isolating the pectoral muscles through a hugging motion.

name: Shoulder Press Machine
description: A seated machine for overhead pressing that targets the deltoids and triceps with a guided vertical path.

name: Chest Supported Row Machine
description: A chest-supported machine for rowing movements that isolates the back muscles while minimizing lower back strain.

name: Preacher Curl Machine
description: A machine version of the preacher curl that isolates the biceps with a fixed movement pattern and adjustable resistance.

name: Leg Press Machine
description: A 45-degree angled sled that you load with weight plates for heavy leg pressing targeting quads glutes and hamstrings.

name: Leg Extension Machine
description: A plate-loaded version of the leg extension providing quadriceps isolation with manually loaded resistance.

name: Lying Leg Curl Machine
description: A plate-loaded prone leg curl machine for hamstring isolation using manually loaded weight plates.

name: Seated Leg Curl Machine
description: A plate-loaded seated leg curl targeting the hamstrings with manually loaded resistance plates.

name: Standing Calf Raise Machine
description: A plate-loaded standing calf raise machine for targeting the gastrocnemius with heavy loads.

name: Seated Calf Raise Machine
description: A plate-loaded seated calf raise machine emphasizing the soleus muscle with manually loaded resistance.

name: Hack Squat Machine
description: An angled sled machine for squatting with back support targeting the quads with reduced spinal load.

name: Glute Kickback Machine
description: A machine for standing hip extension movements that isolates and targets the glute muscles.

name: Machine Chest Press
description: A plate-loaded chest press machine providing a natural pressing arc for chest shoulder and tricep development.

name: Shoulder Press Machine
description: A plate-loaded overhead press machine for deltoid development with a guided pressing path.

name: Chest Supported Row Machine
description: A plate-loaded row machine with chest support for heavy back training while protecting the lower back.

name: Hip Thrust Machine
description: A dedicated machine for hip thrusts providing a stable platform and lever system for maximum glute activation.

name: Bodyweight
description: No equipment needed. Uses your own body weight as resistance for exercises like push-ups pull-ups and squats.

name: Flat Bench
description: A simple sturdy flat bench used for dumbbell presses step-ups and as a platform for various exercises.

name: Pull-Up Bar
description: A fixed overhead bar for pull-ups chin-ups and hanging exercises targeting the back and biceps.

name: Dip Station
description: Parallel bars at waist height for dip exercises targeting the chest triceps and shoulders.

name: Roman Chair
description: An angled pad for back extensions and glute-ham raises strengthening the posterior chain.

name: Ab Wheel
description: A small wheel with handles that rolls along the floor for intense abdominal and core strengthening exercises.

name: Captains Chair
description: A frame with padded arm rests for hanging leg raises and knee raises targeting the abdominals.

name: Decline Core Bench
description: A declined bench for sit-ups and core exercises providing increased range of motion and resistance through gravity.

name: Straight Bar
description: A straight metal bar that attaches to cable machines for pulldowns rows curls and pressdowns.

name: Rope
description: A braided rope attachment with knotted ends for cable exercises like tricep pushdowns and face pulls.

name: D-Handles
description: Single-grip handles that attach to cables allowing unilateral movements like single-arm rows and flyes.

name: EZ-Bar
description: A W-shaped free weight bar that reduces wrist strain during bicep curls and tricep exercises.

name: EZ-Bar Cable
description: A W-shaped bar attachment for cable machines combining the ergonomic grip with constant cable tension.

name: Ankle Strap
description: A padded strap that wraps around the ankle connecting to a cable for leg exercises like kickbacks and hip abductions.

name: Resistance Band
description: Elastic bands providing variable resistance for warm-ups mobility work and assisted or resisted exercises.

name: Weight Belt
description: A belt with a chain for adding weight plates to bodyweight exercises like pull-ups and dips.

name: Close Grip
description: A narrow double-handle attachment for close-grip cable rows and pulldowns emphasizing the inner back muscles.

name: Neutral Grip
description: A multi-grip bar attachment with parallel handles for neutral-grip pulldowns and rows reducing shoulder stress.

name: Wide Bar
description: A wide lat pulldown bar for wide-grip cable exercises targeting the outer lats and upper back.
